title: v2 invoke request (sync- or deferred-capable)
description: Request body a host sends to a plugin action to invoke it under contract_version 2 (docs/plugin-system/deferred-completion-design.md §4). This is the SAME compatible payload as v1/invoke-request.schema.json (docs/plugin-system/README.md §7: 'contract_version 单调递增；平台保证同一大版本内只增字段不删改' — v2 only adds host_api_base_url, it never removes or renames v1 fields), with contract_version fixed to 2 and an additional required host_api_base_url so the plugin can address host callbacks (anti-SSRF: the plugin must never construct or guess this origin itself). Whether the invoked action ultimately responds synchronously (v1/invoke-response.schema.json envelope) or with a deferred-accepted envelope (v2/invoke-accepted-response.schema.json) is determined by the action's manifest completion_mode, not by anything in this request body.

contract_version.description: Fixed to 2 for the sync- or deferred-capable contract.
